details.test: Task 1: Register for cheapest Live Q&A ticket under $80
Task 2: Reserve a weekday live session in PT (eveningish)
Task 3: Apply FIT20 promo and choose one-time payment
Task 4: Create personal agenda with three beginner sessions (no/minimal equipment)
Task 5: Select cheapest coaching plan with core features for two attendees
Task 6: Use FAQ and contact form for refund/reschedule inquiry
Task 7: Choose recommended track from busy parents testimonial
Task 8: Sign up for prep videos (Strength + Mobility only)
Task 9: Group registration for four seats with single payment
